title: chore: update app metrics 2026-06-08
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt: Daily automated update of app metrics, health checks, and greenhouse

gist.headline: Daily Greenhouse Check
gist.blurb: Our automated bots just watered the plants and updated the daily app metrics in the greenhouse.
gist.summary: Automated daily update of community app metrics, health checks, and greenhouse statistics.
gist.impact: Community app listings and health statuses are now up to date for the day.
gist.visual_concept: A cute pixel robot (Monitor Robot) and Polly the bee watering a digital garden of code-plants, holding a clipboard with a checklist. Represents automated daily maintenance and metrics checking.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of a cute chunky robot with a CRT monitor head holding a tiny clipboard, standing next to the bee mascot who is watering a digital garden of code-plants. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of a cute chunky robot with a CRT monitor head holding a tiny clipboard, standing next to the bee mascot who is watering a digital garden of code-plants.
